title: French Pan-Seared Sole
description: Delicate sole fillets pan-seared to perfection, served with a crispy garlic butter crust.
instructions: Season the sole fillets with salt and pepper.
Heat the olive oil in a large skillet over medium-high heat.
Add the garlic and sauté for 1 minute.
Add the sole fillets and sear for 2-3 minutes on each side, until golden brown.
Transfer the skillet to the oven and bake at 400°F (200°C) for 5-7 minutes, until cooked through.
Remove the skillet from the oven and sprinkle with flaky sea salt to taste.
Serve the sole fillets immediately, garnished with chopped parsley.
